description: Complete takt baseline: fix retro routing, add stale action item escalation, automated PR creation, and auto-retro

userStories.title: Fix retro routing confusion
userStories.description: As a takt user, I want 'takt retro' to always trigger the retro agent so that I don't accidentally end up in the PRD converter.
acceptanceCriteria: When a user says 'takt retro', the session agent reads ~/.claude/lib/takt/retro.md and runs the retro flow — never the /takt slash command
The /takt command description explicitly states it is for PRD-to-stories conversion only and rejects retro requests
The takt CLAUDE.md includes a routing table mapping each takt phrase to its prompt file

userStories.title: Stale action item escalation in retro agent
userStories.description: As a takt user, I want the retro agent to detect and escalate stale action items so that recurring issues get addressed instead of silently carrying forward.
acceptanceCriteria: When the retro agent finds an action item carried forward 3+ retros without being addressed, it escalates the alert to confirmed and appends a suggested story description
Carried-forward action items are marked with their carry count (e.g., '[carried 4x]') in the retro entry
When an action item is addressed, the escalation resets

userStories.title: Automated PR creation phase
userStories.description: As a takt orchestrator, I want to automatically create a GitHub PR after code review passes so that the human only needs to merge.
acceptanceCriteria: After the code review phase, the orchestrator runs 'gh pr create' with a structured body containing summary, stories completed, verification result, review notes, and run metrics
The PR is created as draft if unresolved review suggestions exist, or ready if the review was clean
Both solo.md and team-lead.md include the PR creation phase after code review and before completion

userStories.title: Auto-retro phase
userStories.description: As a takt orchestrator, I want the retro to run automatically after PR creation so that the full pipeline completes without manual intervention.
acceptanceCriteria: After PR creation, the orchestrator spawns a retro agent Task that reads workbooks, generates a retro entry, and commits the result to the feature branch
The session agent's completion message reports the PR URL and retro summary instead of suggesting 'run takt retro'
Both solo.md and team-lead.md include the auto-retro phase as the final step before the completion signal
